texto: I hope no one who reads this book has been quite as miserable as Susan and Lucy were that night
autor: but if you have been - if you've been up all night and cried till you have no more tears left in you - you will know that there comes in the end a sort of quietness. You feel as if nothing is ever going to happen again.
explicacao: Citação de but if you have been - if you've been up all night and cried till you have no more tears left in you - you will know that there comes in the end a sort of quietness. You feel as if nothing is ever going to happen again. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I hope no one who reads this book has been quite as miserable as Susan and Lucy were that night” articula reflexao, c-s-lewis, the-lion em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
